examples.title: Algorithm: Linear Search
examples.description: Finds the index of a target value within an array
examples.code:
ALGORITHM LinearSearch(arr, target)
INPUT: arr (array), target (value)
OUTPUT: index (integer)

BEGIN
 FOR i FROM 0 TO arr.length - 1
 IF arr[i] == target THEN
 RETURN i
 END FOR
 RETURN -1
END
examples.explanation: Iterates through each element of the array, comparing it to the target value. If a match is found, returns the index. If no match is found, returns -1.

examples.title: C: Bubble Sort
examples.description: Sorts an array in ascending order
examples.explanation: Iterates through each element of the array, comparing it to the next element. If the current element is greater than the next element, swaps them.
